metadata.name: Track a Shipment of Hard Drives

description: A production needs to track a shipment of hard drives containing raw footage being sent from a location shoot back to the studio.

nodes.task_description: Get the tracking number for the shipment from the location manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the correct tracking number.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the shipment using the courier's tracking service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the shipment is currently in transit and scheduled for delivery tomorrow.

nodes.task_description: Notify the post-production supervisor of the estimated delivery time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a clear notification with the tracking details.
